steps.title: Identify the relationship (Pythagoras / SOH-CAH-TOA)
steps.content:
From angle $x°$, the opposite side is $63$ and the hypotenuse is $73$. Apply SOH:
$$\sin(x°) = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing side
steps.content:
Substitute the values:
$$\sin(x°) = \frac{63}{73}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
